to_display: Sinister Sanctum (execution lane on iter23-eve-polish-icon-mintty branch)
subject: 5 minor sub-5-LOC UI fixes from eve-ui-flow-audit-2026-05-25.md
context: Sub-2 of iter-23 research swarm audited 8 EVE TUI pages and found 87.5% compliance with eve-ui-uniformity-doctrine. The 5 minor fixes below are all <5 LOC and non-blocking. Picking these up while you're already editing eve.py keeps churn low.

fixes.patch: add `clear_screen()` before first `health_status()` call in menu_loop entry
add `clear_screen()` before header print in render_menu()
delete duplicate _clear_screen() impls; replace with `from eve_ui import clear_screen`
route SIGINT through _route_home() + os._exit fallback per main_menu.py:45-68 two-strike pattern
fixes.rationale: consistency with operator 2026-05-25T02:15Z two-strike Ctrl-C handler

fixes.patch: ensure footer uses same block geometry as body for centered alignment

smoke_target: after applying all 5: open each affected page in EVE.exe; verify (a) no flicker on entry, (b) Ctrl-C two-strike works in account_manager, (c) quantum_tools footer block-centered.
dependencies: None. All 5 can land in one commit or be split.
